prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江大学在贵州省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为859→246→402→178→203名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），近两年稳定在200名左右；202 5年基准位次约203名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为22→47→26→19→20人，波动较大；2026年计划大幅扩招至38人，较2025年增长90%，扩招幅度显著 ，预计将拉低录取门槛（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第3名（2021–2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次， 对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端与校园安全事件，但浙大作为顶尖名校，声誉韧性较强；抖音热度为高热（总排名第14），短视 频曝光量大，反映考生关注度居高不下；历史投档异常信号以中性/混合为主，未见明显断档记录；拥有计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+ 、光学工程A+、临床医学A等39个A-及以上学科，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学等浙大王牌专业持续高 热推荐；贵州省2026年高考总人数约29.9万，按近年比例估算物理类约20.8万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争基数稳定；浙江大学 位于浙江省杭州市，属长三角核心城市，地域吸引力强；贵州省属西南省份，跨省报考热度较高，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次203名、2026年物理类 招生计划大幅扩招90%（38人）、考生总数基本稳定、浙大顶尖层次与高热关注度等因素；考虑到扩招幅度虽大但浙大品牌效应强劲、王牌 专业热度不减，小幅修正后预测2026年最低录取位次约298名，区间248–348名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（计算机科学与技术）
- 人工智能
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（临床医学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息）（计算机、信息安全、软件工程、光电、电子等）
- 理科试验班（数学类）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源）（储能、过程装备、能源与环境）
- 工科试验班（先进新材料）（材料科学与工程、高分子）
- 理科试验班（自然科学）（生物科学、生态学、化学、地理信息科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间248–348名内，建议以二档工科试验班（信息）和理科试验班（数学类）为主攻方向，一档竺可桢学院班级可作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优 于区间下限（<248名）可重点冲击图灵班、人工智能等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Guizhou Province's Science/Physics category were 859 → 246 → 402 → 178 → 203, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), stabilizing around 200 in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 203; enrollment plans for Physics category from 2021 to 2025 were 22 → 47 → 26 → 19 → 20, with significant fluctuations; the 2026 plan drastically expands to 38 students, a 90% increase from 2025, a notable expansion that is expected to lower the admission threshold (increase ranking numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, with strong appeal to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, but as a top prestigious university, Zhejiang University's reputation resilience is strong; Douyin popularity is high (overall rank 14), with significant short video exposure, reflecting sustained high candidate attention; historical admission anomaly signals are mostly neutral/mixed, with no obvious gaps; it has 39 A- and above disciplines including Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Clinical Medicine A, etc., with top-tier academic strength nationwide, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University's flagship majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, with an estimated Physics category of about 208,000 based on recent proportions, roughly stable compared to 2025, with a stable competition base; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; Guizhou Province is a southwestern province, with high cross-province application enthusiasm and no local enrollment bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 203, the significant 90% expansion of the 2026 Physics category enrollment plan (38 students), the basically stable total number of candidates, and Zhejiang University's top-tier level and high attention; taking into account that despite the large expansion, Zhejiang University's brand effect is strong and flagship major popularity remains high, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 298, with a range of 248–348.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (Computer Science and Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Pardee Medical Class) (Clinical Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (Computer Science, Information Security, Software Engineering, Optoelectronics, Electronics, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy) (Energy Storage, Process Equipment, Energy and Environment)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced New Materials) (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymers)
- Science Experimental Class (Natural Sciences) (Biological Sciences, Ecology, Chemistry, Geographic Information Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 248–348, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Information) and Science Experimental Class (Mathematics) as main targets, with Tier 1 Chu Kochen Honors College classes as sprint goals, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<248), focus on sprinting for the Turing Class, Artificial Intelligence, and other flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Guizhou Province's Liberal Arts/History Category were 58 → 127 → 127 → 86 → 83, showing a fluctuating trend of moving back and then recovering; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 83; the enrollment plans for Liberal Arts/History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 1 → 1 → 8 → 4 → 4 students, and the 2026 plan significantly expands to 10 students, a 150% increase compared to 2025, with a very large expansion magnitude, expected to significantly lower the admission threshold (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 3rd nationally by Soft Science, belonging to top comprehensive universities, with strong liberal arts strength (Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Law A, etc.); the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, but as a top prestigious university, Zhejiang University's overall reputation is stable; Douyin popularity is high, with sustained high attention from examinees; historical admission anomaly signals are mainly neutral/mixed; Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Law A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, etc., covering a wide range of advantageous liberal arts disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is divided and wait-and-see, teacher education is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; the total number of examinees for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 91,000 in the History Category based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to examinees from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 83, the 2026 History Category enrollment plan significantly expanding by 150% (10 students), stable total examinee numbers, and Zhejiang University's strong liberal arts strength; considering the very large expansion magnitude but Zhejiang University's strong brand effect, after minor adjustments, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 148, with a range of 98–198.
